description:
Applicable Scenarios

  • Car Interior Cleaning: Easily handles dust and debris in car seats, floor mats, and air vents. The crevice nozzle can reach deep into seat gaps, solving the problem of incomplete cleaning with traditional car vacuum cleaners.
  • Home Daily Use: Cleans floors, sofas, and window sills in living rooms and bedrooms. The vacuum-mop function is suitable for cleaning oil stains on kitchen floors after meals or snack crumbs in children's rooms.
  • Pet-Friendly Homes: Efficiently absorbs cat and dog hair, preventing hair from flying around and keeping the home environment clean.
  • Carpets/Mattresses: Deep cleans mites and dander from carpets and mattresses, improving living hygiene.
